summary: Shared purged+embargoed walk-forward CV utility extracted to fincept_core.datasets.cv. All three call sites delegate to the shared implementation. No duplicated fold-math remains.

call_sites.name: services/agents/gbm_predictor/train.py
call_sites.delegation: full — fold-position math delegated; local walk_forward_slices applies purge_bars per-fold during slice translation

call_sites.name: services/backtester/walk_forward.py
call_sites.import: from fincept_core.datasets.cv import Fold as _SharedFold, make_folds as _shared_make_folds
call_sites.delegation: full via _make_folds_local -> _shared_make_folds; public make_folds is a deprecated shim re-wrapping Pydantic Fold into local frozen-dataclass Fold

call_sites.name: services/quant_foundry/training_manifest.py
call_sites.delegation: full — re-wraps into local WalkForwardWindow dataclass to preserve public surface

backwards_compatibility: preserved via deprecated shims (backtester) and thin re-wrappers (quant_foundry)
